intro.heading: One shop, one crew — all over Greater Philadelphia.
intro.lede: We cut every slab at our own shop in Lansdowne and template every job ourselves. That radius covers the Main Line, Philadelphia, and the four surrounding counties.

regions.name: The Main Line
regions.blurb: Home turf. Our showroom sits on Lancaster Avenue in Ardmore, and we've installed kitchens and baths here since 2001.
regions.towns: Ardmore · Bryn Mawr · Villanova · Wayne · Haverford · Wynnewood · Narberth · Radnor

regions.name: Delaware County
regions.blurb: Our fabrication shop is in Lansdowne, so Delco installs are minutes from where the stone is cut.
regions.towns: Media · Havertown · Springfield · Newtown Square · Drexel Hill · Lansdowne · Broomall

regions.name: Philadelphia
regions.blurb: Rowhome galley kitchens to Chestnut Hill estates — we template, fabricate, and install across the city.
regions.towns: Chestnut Hill · Manayunk · Roxborough · East Falls · Center City · South Philly

regions.name: Montgomery County
regions.blurb: A short run up the Schuylkill from the showroom, covered by the same crew and the same lifetime warranty.
regions.towns: King of Prussia · Conshohocken · Blue Bell · Plymouth Meeting · Norristown · Ambler

regions.name: Chester County
regions.blurb: Kitchens, baths, and commercial spaces west along the Route 30 and 202 corridors.
regions.towns: West Chester · Malvern · Paoli · Exton · Berwyn · Kennett Square

regions.name: Bucks County
regions.blurb: Regular installation territory north of the city, from the river towns to Doylestown.
regions.towns: Doylestown · Newtown · Yardley · New Hope · Langhorne · Warrington

faq.q: Do you install countertops in Philadelphia?
faq.a: Yes. We fabricate granite, quartz, and marble countertops at our own shop in Lansdowne and install throughout Philadelphia — Chestnut Hill, Manayunk, Center City, and the surrounding neighborhoods.
Yes — our fabrication shop is in Lansdowne, in the heart of Delaware County. We install in Media, Havertown, Springfield, Newtown Square, Drexel Hill, and across the county.
Yes. We regularly install countertops, tile, and cabinets in West Chester, Malvern, Paoli, and throughout Chester County.

faq.q: Do you install in Bucks County?
faq.a: Yes. Bucks County projects — Doylestown, Newtown, Yardley, and nearby — are within our regular installation range.

faq.q: Where can I see slabs in person?
faq.a: Our showroom at 130 E Lancaster Ave in Ardmore displays full-size quartz, granite, marble, and natural stone slabs, plus our Daltile tile selection and cabinet door lines. Open Monday through Saturday, Sunday by appointment.

faq.q: Is there a charge for estimates?
faq.a: No — estimates are free. Tell us about your project and we call back within one business day, usually the same afternoon.

cta.text: In our area? Estimates are free and the callback is fast.
